summary: Unified Smart Stop System - All 47 backend API tests executed. 46/47 passed (98%). One transient 502 error on first request (network issue), all subsequent calls to same endpoint succeeded. All endpoints working correctly: 6 stop modes, 8 setup rules, 6 trailing modes, 4 urgency levels, calculate, intelligent-calculate, compare, recommend, analyze-trade.

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 errors (transient network issue, retried tests pass)

features_verified.GET /api/smart-stops/modes: PASS - Returns 6 stop modes: original, atr_dynamic, anti_hunt, volatility_adjusted, layered, chandelier
features_verified.GET /api/smart-stops/setup-rules: PASS - Returns 8 setup types: breakout, pullback, momentum, mean_reversion, gap_and_go, vwap_reversal, earnings_play, default
features_verified.GET /api/smart-stops/trailing-modes: PASS - Returns 6 trailing modes: none, atr, percent, chandelier, breakeven_plus, parabolic
features_verified.GET /api/smart-stops/urgency-levels: PASS - Returns 4 urgency levels: normal, caution, high_alert, emergency
features_verified.GET /api/smart-stops/compare: PASS - Compares all 6 modes, anti_hunt provides deepest protection for longs
features_verified.GET /api/smart-stops/recommend/{symbol}: PASS - Low float/volume → anti_hunt, high volatility → volatility_adjusted, premarket → anti_hunt
features_verified.POST /api/smart-stops/calculate: PASS - All 6 modes working, layered returns 3 stops with 40/30/30 split
features_verified.POST /api/smart-stops/intelligent-calcul: PASS - All 8 setups working, returns comprehensive analysis with layered stops, scale-out plan, confidence, urgency
features_verified.POST /api/smart-stops/analyze-trade: PASS - Returns current vs optimal stop comparison with recommendations
features_verified.anti_hunt_deeper_than_original: PASS - Anti-hunt stop is lower than original for longs
features_verified.volatility_adjusted_widens_in_high_vol: PASS - High vol stop is lower than normal vol stop
features_verified.short_direction_stop_above_entry: PASS - Short stops correctly placed above entry price

critical_code_review_comments: The unified smart_stop_service.py correctly implements all features from both previous services
All 6 stop modes calculate correctly with appropriate hunt risk levels
All 8 setup types have correct trailing modes and parameters
Volume profile calculation implemented with POC, VAH/VAL, HVN/LVN
Stop hunt risk assessment correctly scores low float (<10M) and low volume (<500K)
Layered stops correctly split 40/30/30 at ATR depths 1.0/1.5/2.0
Scale-out plan correctly calculates R-multiple targets
Regime and sector adjustments applied when services available
Round number avoidance with 0.2% buffer implemented
Min/max stop distance constraints (2-8%) properly enforced

mocked_apis.note: Pure calculation service - no external API mocking. Sector/regime services return default values (1.0) when unavailable.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Smart Stop System at /api/smart-stops/ fully tested. Successfully merged two redundant services (intelligent_stop_manager.py and smart_stop_service.py) into single service. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_unified_smart_stop_service.py covers all 9 endpoints with 47 test cases. All 6 stop modes, 8 setup types, 6 trailing modes, and 4 urgency levels verified working.
